input: session sequences (temporally ordered item interactions within sessions) and a global item transition graph
output: next-item recommendation for a given session
backbone: multi-task learning framework with position-aware attention (intra-session) and graph-structured hierarchical relation encoder (inter-session)
loss: multi-task loss (intra-session and inter-session objectives, likely cross-entropy or BPR)
key_idea: jointly learn intra-session and inter-session item transition dynamics via multi-task learning with a global graph encoder
